subcodes.first_line: O Nabil, son of Nabil! Upon thee be the salutations of God, the Glorious King! Thy name hath come before the face of the Wronged One, and thy remembrance hath been recorded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل ابن نبیل علیک سلام الله الملک الجلیل اسمت امام وجه مظلوم و ذکرت مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of prayer, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
